positive: Minimalist and highly stylized geometric pattern forming an interconnected constellation of abstract glowing celestial bodies. The primary subject is a central cluster of interconnected, luminous abstract shapes (circles, triangles, and stylized stars) rendered in deep sapphire blue, radiant gold foil accents, and matte charcoal grey. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and balanced, utilizing negative space dramatically to enhance the silhouette. The style must be vector art meets futuristic stained glass, giving it high contrast and a clean, crisp look. Focus on clean lines, sharp edges, and strong contrast suitable for repeating textile pattern. Studio lighting, flat lay view, intricate details, maximum print quality, 8k resolution.
